gaps.description: /admin UI panel implemented with device list, hardware panel, config, logs
GPU detection via hardware.js; /api/status returns hardware.gpu fields
gpu-detector.js removed — no references found in src/
profiles/default.json missing cpu-only profile (only apple-silicon and nvidia present)
Docker build and docker-compose not verified to work end-to-end
Test coverage >=98% not confirmed (threshold config not verified)
SIGINT during in-flight request: graceful drain not confirmed
CDN profiles.json cache staleness check (7-day refresh) not implemented
setup.sh Node.js detection and idempotency not fully verified
VAD is client-side only (useVAD.js); no server-side voice activity detection implemented
Server-side VAD silence suppression missing — silence audio reaches STT/LLM pipeline
optimizer.js contains ollama setup code instead of hardware optimization logic; no hardware-adaptive config output
store.del() alias confirmed present in store/index.js
hub.js heartbeat timeout correctly set to 60000ms
brain.js tool_use yields text field in response
hub.js broadcastWakeword() implemented and triggered on wakeword message
memory.js uses mutex lock for concurrent write safety
